text: An assessment tool for managers to measure their staff performance

That sounds like a tool to help managers provide more consistent feedback. To get us started, I've assumed this will use existing performance review documents or meeting notes as input—does that sound right, or are you imagining a more active data collection process?
I want it to be a mobile application so

A mobile app makes sense for quick, on-the-go feedback logging, though it raises questions about how managers will balance that convenience with the need for deep, thoughtful review. How do you envision the manager's workflow—are they using the app to capture 'micro-feedback' throughout the day, or is this primarily for reviewing the final generated report?
